enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Digital Payment
Security Controls) directions, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Digital Payment Security Controls) directions, 2021

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall come into effect six months from the day they are placed
on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
enriched_requirements.object: months from the day they are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
Regulated Entities (REs): a) Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding Regional Rural Banks)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Definitions
All expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, Reserve Bank of India Act,
1934, Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007 or Information Technology Act,
2000/ Information Technology (Amendment) Act, 2008 and Rules made thereunder,
any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, Payment and Settlement Sy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall formulate a policy for digital payment products and services with the
approval of their Board.
enriched_requirements.object: digital payment products and services with the approval of their Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The contours of the policy, while discussing the parameters
of any "new product" including its alignment with the overall business strategy and
inherent risk of the product, risk management/ mitigation measures, compliance
with regulatory instructions, customer experience, etc., should explicitly discuss
about payment security requirements from Functionality, Security and Performance
(FSP) angles such as:
a) Necessary controls to protect the confidentiality of customer data and integrity
of data and processes associated with the digital product/ services offered;
enriched_requirements.object: security requirements from Functionality, Security and Performance (FSP) angles such as: a) Necessary controls to pro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board and Senior Management shall be responsible for implementation of this
policy.
enriched_requirements.object: of this policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The policy shall be reviewed periodically, at least on a yearly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: least on a yearly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs may
formulate this policy separately for its different digital products or include the same
as part of their overall product policy.
enriched_requirements.object: for its different digital products or include the same as part of their overall product policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the policy document should require
that every digital payment product/ services offered addresses the mechanics, clear
definition of starting point, critical intermittent stages/ points and end point in the
digital payment cycle, security aspects, validations till the digital payment is settled,
clear pictorial representation of digital path and exception handling.
enriched_requirements.object: payment product/ services offered addresses the mechanics, clear definition of starting point, critical intermittent stages

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition,
signing off of the above requirements, mechanism for carrying out User Acceptance
Tests (UAT) in multiple stages before roll out, sign off from multiple stakeholders
(post UAT) and data archival requirements shall also be taken in to account.
enriched_requirements.object: to account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
need for an external assessment of the entire process including the logic, build and
security aspects of the application(s) supporting the digital product should be clearly
articulated.

REs shall incorporate appropriate processes into their governance and risk
management programs for identifying, analysing, monitoring and managing the
specific risks, including compliance risk and fraud risk, associated with the portfolio
of digital payment products and services on a continual basis and in a holistic
manner.
enriched_requirements.object: their governance and risk management programs for identifying, analysing, monitoring and managing the specific

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board/ Senior Management of REs shall have appropriate
performance monitoring systems/ key performance indicators for assessing
whether the product or service offered through digital payment channels meet
operational and security norms.
enriched_requirements.object: systems/ key performance indicators for assessing whether the product or service offered through digital payme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As part of this process, the REs shall define product-level limits on the level of
acceptable security risk, document specific security objectives and performance
criteria including quantitative benchmarks for evaluating the success of the security
built into the digital payment product or service, periodically compare actual results
with projections and qualitative benchmarks to detect and address adverse trends
or concerns in a timely manner and modify the business plan/ strategy involving the
product, when appropriate, based on the security performance of the product or
service.
enriched_requirements.object: the level of acceptable security risk, document specific security objectives and performance criteria including quantitative benchmarks for evaluating the success of the security built into the digital payment product or service, periodically compare actual results with projections and qualitative benchmarks to detect and address adverse trends or concerns in a timely manner and modify the business plan/ strategy involving the product

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall have trained resources with necessary expertise to manage the digital
payment infrastructure.
enriched_requirements.object: necessary expertise to manage the digital payment infrastructure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Wherever the REs are dependent on third party service
providers, adequate oversight and controls for monitoring the activities of the third
party personnel, in line with RBI guidelines on outsourcing, shall be put in place.

REs shall conduct risk assessments with regard to the safety and security of digital
payment products and associated processes and services as well as suitability and
appropriateness of the same vis-a-vis the target users, both prior to establishing the
service(s) and regularly thereafter.
enriched_requirements.object: regard to the safety and security of digital payment products and associated processes and services as well as suitabili

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The risk assessment should take into account -
a) The technology stack and solutions used;
enriched_requirements.object: a) The technology stack and solutions used

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Such assessment shall cover the surrounding ecosystem as well.
enriched_requirements.object: as well

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The assessment
of risks shall address the need to protect and secure payment data1 and evaluate
the resilience of systems.
enriched_requirements.object: protect and secure payment data1 and evaluate the resilience of systems

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The internal Risk and Control Self-Assessment (RCSA)
exercise shall cover the risks (inherent) & controls vis-à-vis the probability and
impact of threats to arrive at residual risk.
enriched_requirements.object: & controls vis-à-vis the probability and impact of threats to arrive at residual risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall evaluate the risks associated with the chosen technology platforms,
application architecture, both on the server and client side.
enriched_requirements.object: with the chosen technology platforms, application architecture, both on the server and client side

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, REs should
undertake a review of the risk scenarios and existing security measures based on
incidents affecting their services, before any major change to the infrastructure or
procedures is made or, when, any new threats are identified through risk monitoring
activities.
enriched_requirements.object: the risk scenarios and existing security measures based on incidents affecting their services, before any major change to the infrastructure or procedures is made or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, unused or unwanted features of the platform should be closely
controlled to minimise risk.
enriched_requirements.object: minimise risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall develop sound internal control systems and take into account the
operational risk before offering digital payment products and related services.
enriched_requirements.object: systems and take into account the operational risk before offering digital payment products and related services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that the digital payment architecture is robust and scalable,
commensurate with the transaction volumes and customer growth.
enriched_requirements.object: payment architecture is robust and scalable, commensurate with the transaction volumes and customer growth

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The IT strategy
of the RE shall ensure that a robust capacity management plan is in place to meet
evolving demand.
enriched_requirements.object: capacity management plan is in place to meet evolving demand

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall also put in place review mechanism of IT/ IT Security
architecture and technology platform overhaul on a periodic basis based on Board-
approved policy.
enriched_requirements.object: review mechanism of IT/ IT Security architecture and technology platform overhaul on a periodic basis based on Board- approved polic
and procedures in place to periodically test the backed-up data, application pertaining to digital products to ensure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These facilities should be tested at least
on a half-yearly basis for digital payment products and services.
enriched_requirements.object: on a half-yearly basis for digital payment products and services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The communication protocol in the digital payment channels (especially over
Internet) shall adhere to a secure standard.
enriched_requirements.object: standard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An appropriate level of encryption and
security shall be implemented in the digital payment ecosystem.
enriched_requirements.object: digital payment ecosystem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Web applications providing the digital payment products and services should not
store sensitive information in HTML hidden fields, cookies, or any other client-side
storage to avoid any compromise in the integrity of the data.
enriched_requirements.object: HTML hidden fields, cookies, or any other client-side storage to avoid any compromise in the integrity of the data

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall implement Web Application Firewall (WAF) solution and DDoS mitigation
techniques to secure the digital payment products and services offered over
Internet.
enriched_requirements.object: (WAF) solution and DDoS mitigation techniques to secure the digital payment products and services offered over Inte

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The key length (for symmetric/ asymmetric encryption, hashing), algorithms (for
encryption, signing, exchange of keys, creation of message digest, random number
generators), cipher suites, digital certificates and applicable protocols used in
transmission channels, processing of data, authentication purpose, shall be strong,
adopting internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/
demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configurations involved in
implementing such controls are in general, compliant with extant instructions and
the law of the land.
enriched_requirements.object: accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/ demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configur

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall renew their digital certificates used in digital payment ecosystem well in
time.
enriched_requirements.object: used in digital payment ecosystem well in time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The mobile application2 and internet banking application should have effective
logging and monitoring capabilities to track user activity, security changes and
identify anomalous behaviour and transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: monitoring capabilities to track user activity, security changes and identify anomalous behaviour and transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall implement multi-tier application architecture, segregating application,
database and presentation layer in the digital payment products and services.
enriched_requirements.object: segregating application, database and presentation layer in the digital payment products and services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall follow a 'secure by design' approach in the development of digital
payment products and services.
enriched_requirements.object: design' approach in the development of digital payment products and services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that digital payment applications
are inherently more secure by embedding security within their development
lifecycle.
enriched_requirements.object: applications are inherently more secure by embedding security within their development lifecycle

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall explicitly define security objectives (including protection of customer
information/ data) during (a) requirements gathering, (b) designing, (c)
development, (d) testing including source code review, (e) implementation,
maintenance & monitoring and (f) decommissioning phases of the digital payment
applications.
enriched_requirements.object: (including protection of customer information/ data) during (a) requirements gathering, (b) designing, (c) devel

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs (including those partnering with other entities to co-brand/ co-develop
applications) shall adopt and incorporate a threat modelling approach during
application lifecycle management into their policies, processes, guidelines and
procedures.
enriched_requirements.object: threat modelling approach during application lifecycle management into their policies, processes, guidelines and procedures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For digital payment applications that are licensed by a third party vendor, REs shall
have an escrow arrangement for the source code for ensuring continuity of services
in case the vendor defaults or is unable to provide services.
enriched_requirements.object: for the source code for ensuring continuity of services in case the vendor defaults or is unable to provide services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall conduct security testing including review of source code, Vulnerability
Assessment (VA) and Penetration Testing (PT) of their digital payment applications
to assure that the application is secure for putting through transactions while
preserving confidentiality and integrity of the data that is stored and transmitted.
enriched_requirements.object: review of source code, Vulnerability Assessment (VA) and Penetration Testing (PT) of their digital payment applicat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such testing should invariably cover compliance with various standards like
OWASP.
enriched_requirements.object: various standards like OWASP

conditions: If the source code is not owned by the RE
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the source code is not owned by the RE, then, in such cases, the RE
shall obtain a certificate from the application developer stating that the application
is free of known vulnerabilities, malwares and any covert channels in the code.
enriched_requirements.object: the application developer stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities, malwares and any covert channels in
on a half-yearly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PT shall be
conducted at least on a yearly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: on a yearly basis

conditions: when any major change is performed in application or infrastructure
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In addition, VA/PT shall be conducted as and when any new IT Infrastructure or digital payment application is introduced or when any major change is performed in application or infrastructure;
enriched_requirements.object: when any new IT Infrastructure or digital payment application is introduced or when any major change is performed in application o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
b) Testing related to review of source code/ certification shall be conducted/
obtained.

conditions: if changes/ upgrades have been made to the application during the year
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: This shall continue on a yearly basis, if changes/ upgrades have been made to the application during the year;
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
c) Testing/ Certification should broadly address the objective that the product/
version/module(s) functions only in a manner that it is intended to do, is developed as per the best secure design/ coding practices and standards, addressing known flaws/threats due to insecure coding;
enriched_requirements.object: that the product/ version/module(s) functions only in a manner that it is intended to do, is developed as per the best s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and d) Penal provisions shall be included by the RE into third-party contractual
arrangements for any non-compliance by the application provider.
enriched_requirements.object: RE into third-party contractual arrangements for any non-compliance by the application provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs may also run automated VA scanning tools to automatically scan all systems
on the network that are critical, public facing or store customer sensitive data on a
continuous/ more frequent basis.
enriched_requirements.object: scanning tools to automatically scan all systems on the network that are critical, public facing or store customer sensitive dat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall compare the results from earlier vulnerability scans to verify/ ascertain
that vulnerabilities are addressed either by patching, implementing a compensating
control, or documenting and accepting the residual risk with necessary approval
and that there is no recurrence of the known vulnerabilities.
enriched_requirements.object: earlier vulnerability scans to verify/ ascertain that vulnerabilities are addressed either by patching, implementing a compen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The identified
vulnerabilities should be fixed in a time-bound manner.
enriched_requirements.object: time-bound manner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that all vulnerability scanning is performed in authenticated mode
either with agents running locally on the system to analyse the security configuration
or with remote scanners that are given administrative rights on the system being
tested.3
enriched_requirements.object: scanning is performed in authenticated mode either with agents running locally on the system to analyse the security con

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall verify and thoroughly test the functionality (to validate whether the system
meets the functional requirements/ specifications) and security controls of payment
products and services before its launch/ moving to the production environment.
enriched_requirements.object: the functionality (to validate whether the system meets the functional requirements/ specifications) and security controls

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall institute a mechanism to actively monitor for the non-genuine/
unauthorised/ malicious applications (with similar name/ features) on popular app-
stores and the Web and respond accordingly to bring them down.
enriched_requirements.object: actively monitor for the non-genuine/ unauthorised/ malicious applications (with similar name/ features) on popular app- stor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The server at the RE's end should have adequate checks and balances to ensure
that no transaction is carried out through non-genuine/ unauthorised digital payment
products/ applications and the authentication process is robust, secure and
centralised.
enriched_requirements.object: balances to ensure that no transaction is carried out through non-genuine/ unauthorised digital payment products/ application

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The security controls for digital payment applications must focus on how these
applications handle, store and protect payment data.
enriched_requirements.object: applications handle, store and protect payment data

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall refer to standards such as OWASP-MASVS, OWASP-ASVS
and other relevant OWASP standards, security and data protection guidelines in
ISO 12812, threat catalogues and guides developed by NIST (including for
Bluetooth and LTE security), for application security and other protection measures.
enriched_requirements.object: as OWASP-MASVS, OWASP-ASVS and other relevant OWASP standards, security and data protection guidelines in ISO 12812, threat ca

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall redact/ mask customer information such as account numbers/ card
numbers/ other sensitive information when transmitted via SMS/ e-mails.
enriched_requirements.object: such as account numbers/ card numbers/ other sensitive information when transmitted via SMS/ e-mails

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In view of the proliferation of cyber-attacks and their potential consequences, REs
should implement, except where explicitly permitted/ relaxed, multi-factor
authentication for payments through electronic modes and fund transfers, including
cash withdrawals from ATMs/ micro-ATMs/ business correspondents, through
digital payment applications.

At least one of the authentication methodologies
should be generally dynamic or non-replicable.
enriched_requirements.object: non-replicable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs may also adopt adaptive authentication to select the right authentication factors
depending on risk assessment, user risk profile and behaviour.
enriched_requirements.object: to select the right authentication factors depending on risk assessment, user risk profile and behaviour

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this regard,
a) The implementation of appropriate authentication methodologies should be
based on an assessment of the risk posed by the RE's digital payment products and services.
enriched_requirements.object: assessment of the risk posed by the RE's digital payment products and services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The risk should be evaluated in light of the type of customer (e.g., retail/ corporate/ commercial);
enriched_requirements.object: of the type of customer (e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An effective authentication method should take into consideration customer acceptance, ease of use, reliable performance, scalability to accommodate growth, customer profile, location, transaction, etc., and interoperability with other systems.
enriched_requirements.object: acceptance, ease of use, reliable performance, scalability to accommodate growth, customer profile, location, transac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
c) To enhance online processing security, multi factor authentication and alerts
(like SMS, e-mail, etc.) should be applied in respect of all payment transactions (including debits and credits), creation of new account linkages (addition/ modification/ deletion of beneficiaries), changing account details or revision to fund transfer limits.
enriched_requirements.object: of all payment transactions (including debits and credits), creation of new account linkages (addition/ modification/ deletion o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In devising these security features, REs should take into account their efficacy and differing customer preferences for additional online protection.
enriched_requirements.object: efficacy and differing customer preferences for additional online protection

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
d) The alerts and OTPs received by the customer for online transactions shall
identify the merchant name, wherever applicable, rather than the payment aggregator through which the transaction was effected.

e) As an integral part of the multi factor authentication architecture, REs should
also implement appropriate measures to minimise exposure to a middleman attack which is more commonly known as a man-in-the-middle attack (MITM), man-in-the browser (MITB) attack or man-in-the application attack.
enriched_requirements.object: to minimise exposure to a middleman attack which is more commonly known as a man-in-the-middle attack (MITM), man-

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: f) An authenticated session, together with its encryption protocol, should remain intact throughout the interaction with the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: interaction with the customer

conditions: in case the customer closes the application
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Else, in the event of interference or in case the customer closes the application, the session should be terminated, and the affected transactions resolved or reversed out.
enriched_requirements.object: affected transactions resolved or reversed out

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The customer should be promptly notified about the status of the transaction by email, SMS or through other means.
enriched_requirements.object: the status of the transaction by email, SMS or through other means

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs should set down the maximum number of failed log-in or authentication
attempts after which access to the digital payment product/ service is blocked.
enriched_requirements.object: number of failed log-in or authentication attempts after which access to the digital payment product/ service is blocked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They
should have a secure procedure in place to re-activate the access to blocked
product/ service.
enriched_requirements.object: in place to re-activate the access to blocked product/ service

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customer shall be notified for failed log-in or authentication
attempts.
enriched_requirements.object: log-in or authentication attempts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The REs shall document and implement the configuration aspects for identifying
suspicious transactional behaviour in respect of rules, preventive, detective types
of controls, mechanism to alert the customers in case of failed authentication, time
frame for the same, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: configuration aspects for identifying suspicious transactional behaviour in respect of rules, preventive, detective types o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
System alerts shall be parameterised and monitored in terms of various applicable
parameters.
enriched_requirements.object: in terms of various applicable parameters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such parameters, as applicable could be: transaction velocity (e.g.,
fund transfers, cash withdrawals, payments through electronic modes, adding new
beneficiaries, etc.) in a short period, more so in the accounts of customers who've
never used mobile app/ internet banking/ card ever (depending upon the type of
payment channel), high risk merchant category codes (MCC) parameters,
counterfeit card parameters (String of Invalid CVV/ PINs indicates an account
generation attack), new account parameters (excessive activity on a new account),
time zones, geo-locations, IP address origin (in respect of unusual patterns,
prohibited zones/ rogue IPs), behavioural biometrics, transaction origination from
point of compromise, transactions to mobile wallets/ mobile numbers/ VPAs on
whom vishing fraud or other types of fraud is/are registered/ recorded, declined
transactions, transactions with no approval code, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: biometrics, transaction origination from point of compromise, transactions to mobile wallets/ mobile numbers/ VPAs on w

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Fraud analysis shall be conducted to identify the reason for fraud occurrence and
determine mechanism to prevent such frauds.
enriched_requirements.object: the reason for fraud occurrence and determine mechanism to prevent such frauds
and trained in the following skills and areas of expertise: a) Fraud control tools and their usage

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall maintain updated contact details of service providers, intermediaries,
external agencies and other stakeholders (including other REs) for coordination in
incident response.
enriched_requirements.object: of service providers, intermediaries, external agencies and other stakeholders (including other REs) for coordination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall put in place a mechanism with the stakeholders to
update and verify such contact details.
enriched_requirements.object: mechanism with the stakeholders to update and verify such contact details

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall also formulate specific SOPs to
handle incidents related to payment ecosystem to mitigate the loss either to the
customer or RE.
enriched_requirements.object: to handle incidents related to payment ecosystem to mitigate the loss either to the customer or RE

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A real time/ near-real time (not later than 24 hours from the time of receipt of
settlement file(s)) reconciliation framework for all digital payment transactions
between RE and all other stakeholders such as payment system operators,
business correspondents, card networks, payment system processors, payment
aggregators, payment gateways, third party technology service providers, other
participants, etc., shall be put in place for better detection and prevention of
suspicious transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: for better detection and prevention of suspicious transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A mechanism shall be introduced to monitor the
implementation and effectiveness of such framework.
enriched_requirements.object: the implementation and effectiveness of such framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall incorporate secure, safe and responsible usage guidelines and training
materials for end users within the digital payment applications.
enriched_requirements.object: responsible usage guidelines and training materials for end users within the digital payment applications

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They shall also make
it mandatory (i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall mention/ incorporate a section on the digital payment application clearly
specifying the process and procedure (with forms/ contact information, etc.) to lodge
consumer grievances.
enriched_requirements.object: on the digital payment application clearly specifying the process and procedure (with forms/ contact information, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A mechanism to keep this information periodically updated
shall also be put in place.
enriched_requirements.object: place

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reporting facility on the application shall provide an
option for registering a grievance.
enriched_requirements.object: registering a grievance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customer dispute handling, reporting and
resolution procedures, including the expected timelines for the RE's response
should be clearly defined.

REs shall adhere to extant instructions4, updated from time to time, to put in place
system/s for online dispute resolution for resolving disputes and grievances of
customers pertaining to digital payments.
enriched_requirements.object: updated from time to time, to put in place system/s for online dispute resolution for resolving disputes and grievance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall educate customers about the need to maintain the physical and logical
security of their devices accessing digital payment products and services including
recommending secure/ regular installation of operating system and application
updates, downloading applications only from authorised sources, having anti-
malware/ anti-virus applications on devices, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: need to maintain the physical and logical security of their devices accessing digital payment products and services includ

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that its customers are provided information about the risks,
benefits and liabilities of using digital payment products and its related services
before they subscribe to them.
enriched_requirements.object: are provided information about the risks, benefits and liabilities of using digital payment products and its related service

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customers shall also be informed clearly and
precisely on their rights, obligations and responsibilities on matters relating to digital
payments, and, any problems that may arise from its service unavailability,
processing errors and security breaches.
enriched_requirements.object: and precisely on their rights, obligations and responsibilities on matters relating to digital payments, and, any problems th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms and conditions including
customer privacy and security policy applying to digital payment products and
services shall be readily available to customers within the product.
enriched_requirements.object: customers within the product

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All digital
channels are to be offered on express willingness of customers and shall not be
bundled without their knowledge.
enriched_requirements.object: knowledge

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Whenever new operating features or functions, particularly those relating to
security, integrity and authentication, are introduced to online delivery channels,
4 RBI/2020-21/21 DPSS.CO.PD No.116/02.12.004/2020-21 circular dated August 6, 2020 on 'Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) System for Digital Payments'
clear and effective communication followed by sufficient instructions to properly
utilise such new features should be provided to the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs may continuously create public awareness on the types of threats and attacks
used against the consumers while using digital payment products and
precautionary measures to safeguard against the same.
enriched_requirements.object: on the types of threats and attacks used against the consumers while using digital payment products and precautio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customers shall be
cautioned against commonly known threats in recent times like phishing, vishing,
reverse-phishing, remote access of mobile devices and educated to secure and
safeguard their account details, credentials, PIN, card details, devices, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: known threats in recent times like phishing, vishing, reverse-phishing, remote access of mobile devices and educated to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall provide digital payment products and services, to a customer only at her/
his option based on specific written or authenticated electronic requisition along with
a positive acknowledgement of the terms and conditions.
enriched_requirements.object: and services, to a customer only at her/ his option based on specific written or authenticated electronic requisition

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs should provide a mechanism on their mobile and internet banking application
for their customers to, with necessary authentication, identify/ mark a transaction
as fraudulent for seamless and immediate notification to his RE.
enriched_requirements.object: their mobile and internet banking application for their customers to, with necessary authentication, identify/ mark a transacti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On such
notification by the customer, the REs may endeavour to build the capability for
seamless/ instant reporting of fraudulent transactions to the corresponding
beneficiary/ counterparty's RE;
enriched_requirements.object: capability for seamless/ instant reporting of fraudulent transactions to the corresponding beneficiary/ counterparty's RE

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Based on the RE's
individual risk/ vulnerability assessment on authentication-related attacks such as
brute force/ DoS attacks, REs shall implement additional levels of authentication to
internet banking website such as adaptive authentication, strong CAPTCHA
(preferably with anti-bot features) with server-side validation, etc., in order to plug
this vulnerability and prevent its exploitation.
enriched_requirements.object: authentication to internet banking website such as adaptive authentication, strong CAPTCHA (preferably with anti-bot fe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Appropriate measures shall be taken
to prevent DNS cache poisoning attacks and for secure handling of cookies.
enriched_requirements.object: DNS cache poisoning attacks and for secure handling of cookies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Virtual
keyboard option should be made available.
An online session shall be automatically terminated after a fixed period of inactivity.
enriched_requirements.object: a fixed period of inactivity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Secure delivery of password for login purpose shall be ensured.

The password
generated and dispatched by the RE should be valid for a limited period from the
date of its creation.
enriched_requirements.object: limited period from the date of its creation

conditions: If the password is generated and dispatched by the RE
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the password is generated and dispatched by the RE, then,
the user shall be compulsorily required to change the password, on the first login.
enriched_requirements.object: change the password, on the first login

conditions:
When the internet banking application is accessed through external websites (eg:
in case of payment of taxes
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
When the internet banking application is accessed through external websites (eg:
in case of payment of taxes, e-commerce transactions, etc.), the procedure for
authentication and the appearance/ look and feel of the RE's internet banking site
should be made uniform as far as possible.
enriched_requirements.object: far as possible

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On detection of any anomalies or exceptions for which the mobile application was
not programmed, the customer shall be directed to remove the current copy/
instance of the application and proceed with installation of a new copy/ instance of
the application.
enriched_requirements.object: the current copy/ instance of the application and proceed with installation of a new copy/ instance of the application

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall be able to verify the version of the mobile application
before the transactions are enabled.
enriched_requirements.object: the version of the mobile application before the transactions are enabled

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs may consider to perform validation on the security and compatibility condition
of the device/ operating system and the mobile application to ensure that activities
relating to the account are put through the mobile application in a safe and secure
manner.
enriched_requirements.object: on the security and compatibility condition of the device/ operating system and the mobile application to ensure that a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs may explore the feasibility of implementing a code that checks if the device is
rooted/ jailbroken prior to the installation of the mobile application and disallow the
mobile application to install/ function if the phone is rooted/ jailbroken.
enriched_requirements.object: implementing a code that checks if the device is rooted/ jailbroken prior to the installation of the mobile application and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Checksum of current active version of application shall be hosted on public platform
so that users can verify the same.
enriched_requirements.object: platform so that users can verify the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: REs shall ensure device binding of mobile application5.
enriched_requirements.object: mobile application5

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Considering that the additional factor of authentication and mobile application may
reside on the same mobile device in the case of mobile banking, mobile payments,
REs may consider implementing alternatives to SMS-based OTP authentication
mechanisms.
enriched_requirements.object: mobile device in the case of mobile banking, mobile payments, REs may consider implementing alternatives to SMS-based OTP authentic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The mobile application should require re-authentication whenever the device or
application remains unused for a designated period and each time the user
launches the application.
enriched_requirements.object: device or application remains unused for a designated period and each time the user launches the application

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Applications must be able to identify new network
connections or connections from unsecured networks like unsecured Wi-Fi
connections and must implement appropriate authentication/ checks/ measures to
perform transactions under those circumstances.
enriched_requirements.object: new network connections or connections from unsecured networks like unsecured Wi-Fi connections and must implement appropriate aut

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The mobile application should not store/ retain sensitive personal/ consumer
authentication information such as user IDs, passwords, keys, hashes, hard coded
references on the device and the application should securely wipe any sensitive
customer information from memory when the customer/ user exits the application.
enriched_requirements.object: consumer authentication information such as user IDs, passwords, keys, hashes, hard coded references on the device a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that their mobile application limit the writing of sensitive
information into 'temp' files.
enriched_requirements.object: application limit the writing of sensitive information into 'temp' files

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The sensitive information written in such files must be
suitably encrypted/ masked/ hashed and stored securely.
enriched_requirements.object: hashed and stored securely

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs may consider designing anti-malware capabilities into their mobile
applications.
enriched_requirements.object: into their mobile applications

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that the usage of raw (visible) SQL queries in mobile applications
to fetch or update data from databases is avoided.
enriched_requirements.object: of raw (visible) SQL queries in mobile applications to fetch or update data from databases is avoided

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Mobile applications should be
secured from SQL injection type of vulnerabilities.
enriched_requirements.object: injection type of vulnerabilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Sensitive information should be
written to the database in an encrypted form.
enriched_requirements.object: database in an encrypted form

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Web content, as part of the mobile
application's layout, should not be loaded if errors are detected during SSL/ TLS
negotiation.
enriched_requirements.object: are detected during SSL/ TLS negotiation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
expiry/ revocation of the certificate must be
displayed to the user.
enriched_requirements.object: user

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5 The device binding should be preferably implemented through a combination of hardware, software and service information.
enriched_requirements.object: a combination of hardware, software and service information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In case, the RE allows multiple devices to be registered, then, (a) the user must be notified of every new device registration on multiple channels such as registered mobile number, email or phone call and (b) in relation to the mobile application, RE must maintain a record of all registered devices, providing the user a facility to disable a registered device.
enriched_requirements.object: new device registration on multiple channels such as registered mobile number, email or phone call and (b) in relation to the mob

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall follow various payment card standards (over and above PCI-DSS and
PA-DSS6) as per Payment Card Industry (PCI) prescriptions for comprehensive
payment card security as per applicability/ readiness of updated versions of the
standards such as -
a) PCI-PIN (secure management, processing, and transmission of personal
identification number (PIN) data);
enriched_requirements.object: standards (over and above PCI-DSS and PA-DSS6) as per Payment Card Industry (PCI) prescriptions for comprehensive payment
at the merchants for capturing card details for payments or otherwise are validated against the PCI-P2PE program to us

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Acquirers shall secure their card payment infrastructure (Unique Key Per Terminal
- UKPT or Derived Unique Key Per Transaction - DUKPT/ Terminal Line
Encryption - TLE).
enriched_requirements.object: infrastructure (Unique Key Per Terminal - UKPT or Derived Unique Key Per Transaction - DUKPT/ Terminal Line Encryption - TLE
logs must themselves be tamper proof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: c) Access to the HSM should be controlled through Access Control Lists (ACLs);
enriched_requirements.object: Control Lists (ACLs)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
d) Separate ACLs should be maintained for each individual application to ensure
application level isolation;
enriched_requirements.object: individual application to ensure application level isolation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
e) All access to HSM should be managed and monitored using a robust Privileged
Identity and Access Management solution;
enriched_requirements.object: using a robust Privileged Identity and Access Management solution

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: f) Decryption and validation of keys, PIN should be done at HSM;

(ref: PCI security standards website)
g) Card PIN generation and printing should be directly at system connected HSM;
enriched_requirements.object: connected HSM

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: h) CVV generation and validation should be done at HSM;
and k) Security of the physical keys of the HSM device should be properly maintained.

enriched_requirements.object: improving the security posture of the ATM: a) Implement security measures such as BIOS password, disabling USB ports, disa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Use of
ATMs that have unsupported operating systems shall be prohibited.

REs shall ensure robust surveillance/ monitoring of card transactions (especially
overseas cash withdrawals) and setting up of rules and limits commensurate with
their risk appetites.
enriched_requirements.object: of card transactions (especially overseas cash withdrawals) and setting up of rules and limits commensurate wit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall take up with the card network and/ or ATM network
as the case may be, to put in place transaction limits at Card, BIN as well as at the
RE level.
enriched_requirements.object: card network and/ or ATM network as the case may be, to put in place transaction limits at Card, BIN as well as at the RE level

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Such limits shall be mandatorily set at the card network switch itself.
enriched_requirements.object: the card network switch itself

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall put in place transaction control mechanisms with necessary
caps (restrictions on transactions), if any of the limits set as per the above
requirement is breached.
enriched_requirements.object: control mechanisms with necessary caps (restrictions on transactions)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A periodic review mechanism of such limits set as per the
risk appetite of the RE shall be put in place as per the Board-approved policy.
enriched_requirements.object: as per the Board-approved policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs
shall institute a mechanism to monitor breaches, if any, on a 24x7 basis, including
weekends, long holidays and put in place a robust incident response mechanism to
mitigate the fraud loss, on account of suspicious transactions, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: monitor breaches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall
ensure that card details of the customers are not stored in plain text at the RE and
its vendor(s) locations, systems and applications.
enriched_requirements.object: of the customers are not stored in plain text at the RE and its vendor(s) locations, systems and applications

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall also ensure that the
processing of card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner to
strictly avoid data leakage of sensitive customer information.
enriched_requirements.object: processing of card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner to strictly avoid data leakage of sensitive custome

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
REs that use card data scanning tools to identify unencrypted (clear text) payments
card data in their ecosystem especially during audits shall adhere to the following
safety measures:
a) Any tool (procured by/ from a third-party) for the purpose of scanning of
unencrypted card data should first be tested in a test environment to understand the scope and impact of the tool's capabilities;
enriched_requirements.object: safety measures: a) Any tool (procured by/ from a third-party) for the purpose of scanning of unencrypted card data should fir

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: b) The scanning tool should be installed only in the RE's premises on their devices;
enriched_requirements.object: the RE's premises on their devices

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: c) Card data scanning should not be done remotely;
d) The discovered data, if any, must preferably reside in the scanning tool.
enriched_requirements.object: scanning tool

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Exportable card data must be appropriately masked.
(No data, even masked, must be taken out of the RE's premises/ infrastructure);
enriched_requirements.object: the RE's premises/ infrastructure)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and e) Limited access to service providers to conduct the scan or analyse the data, if
at all, must be provided only on the RE's devices.
enriched_requirements.object: the RE's devices
